---
title: "Data: Twitter"
---

### U.S. House

| Congress | Download |
|----------|----------|
| 115th-116th Congress (combined) | [Download CSV](files/TBIP_115116.csv) |

---

**Citation:** Gaynor, S. W., Miler, K., Goel, P., Hoyle, A. M., and Resnik, P. (2026). *Journal of Politics*, 88(4). [https://doi.org/10.1086/736360](https://doi.org/10.1086/736360)
